headline: Open-weight coding models and local image generation break out as agentic AI security concerns harden.
body: Coding models broke out alongside the release of GLM-5.2, an open-weight coder distributed as a free stealth model inside OpenCode with roughly 200 requests per five-hour window. Text-to-image generation also broke out as Krea 2 arrived as an open-source generator for local deployment via ComfyUI with LoRA fine-tuning support. On the agentic side, security framing sharpened around prompt injection, data deletion, and unauthorized actions, and the Broward School Board paused an educator AI platform over privacy and security concerns. Diffusion tooling advanced with DiffusionBench, a holistic evaluation framework for generative diffusion transformers.
